skill_availability_goal: Verify that a maintainer-confirmed target release can pass pre-tag audit and receive a complete unified stamp even while the matching tag is absent.
prompt: 执行 fixture 中定义的 pre-tag audit。维护者已明确确认 `target_release_version: v1.2.0`，`base_ref: v1.1.0`、`target_ref: release-head`，且同名 tag 尚不存在。核对完整受影响页面、#116 handoff、Release Notes、索引、`.meta/releases.json` 和宿主版本事实；全部通过后统一盖章并持久化报告。
